title: Ghoulish 16x
description: A beautiful Halloween themed texturepack, available in orange and purple!
body: This is a Halloween themed PvP texture pack. It includes Halloween versions of the gui, fireball, golden apple and more and also custom textures for the swords, tools, sky, other utility items like the ender pearl, bow etc and blocks like all of the stone blocks, ores or wooden blocks. You can also choose between a purple and an orange recolor. The packs aims to amplify the visual experience of your game and is perfect if you are looking for a Halloween themed texturepack!
